assertions.assertion: Sets EncryptAssertions = true on the SamlServiceProvider
Populates EncryptionCertificates with a certificate loaded from certs/sp-encryption.cer
Sets AllowIdpInitiated = true on the SamlServiceProvider
Mentions that the IdP-initiated SSO endpoint must be enabled via options.Endpoints.EnableSamlIdpInitiatedSsoEndpoint = true
assertions.rationale: Does not mention EnableSamlIdpInitiatedSsoEndpoint. Only sets AllowIdpInitiated on the SP without enabling the endpoint.

assertions.assertion: Does NOT set EncryptAssertions = true without providing EncryptionCertificates
